calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Waukeen McCoy appearing for and with Juna Goldberg. Andrew Woods appearing for himself. Status on why Mr. Woods should not be sanction $25.00 a day for failure to file a proper accounting. Court proposes to accept the defective accounting and would sanction Mr. Woods. Ms. Goldberg wants her $4,000.00 distribution pursuant to the settlement agreement on 4/14/2005. Mr. Woods argues that it is an offset for payment of utility bills. Mr. McCoy argues that his client has been paying the utility bills. Court does not agree with the offset. Court will accept the accounting for filing as an accounting to stop the running of the sanction. Mr. Woods is ordered to pay $3000.00 to Ms. Goldberg and $500.00 to Mr. McCoy's trust account to hold and Mr. McCoy to look into unpaid utility bills by 5/15. Mr. Woods will be responsible for payment of all other bills. Mr. Woods is ordered to pay sanction of $350.00. Mr. McCoy to prepare an order. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Status On Obtaining Counsel And Filing Substition Of Attorney
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of An Accounting By Mr. Woods
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Michael Dupaul appearing for Juna Goldberg. Mr. Woods is not in court. He has not filed a proper accounting. He was in court on 2/6 when the order was made. Court is imposing sanctions of $25.00 a day until he files a proper accounting starting today. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Text Ruling
